entities.name: Bulk Import
entities.context: Workflow process for importing multiple prompts at once

entities.name: Prompts
entities.context: Directory/folder for organizing prompt files in the knowledge system

entities.name: Function
entities.context: A category of prompt files, numbered and versioned (e.g., Function [01] - Prompt A v1.0)

entities.name: Companion
entities.context: A category of context files that accompany Function prompts, numbered and versioned

relationships.context: Bulk Import workflow collects Function files as input
Bulk Import workflow collects Companion files as input
Function and Companion files are organized together in the same Prompts directory
